message:
fix: mount cache in FsStatsCollector, verify() Result type, and misc follow-ups

FsStats (monitor/fs_stats.rs):
- Add mount_cache with TTL to FsStatsCollector, avoiding repeated
  /proc/self/mounts reads on every collect() and collect_many() call
- Clear expired mount cache during prune_expired_cache()
- Add tests for mount cache hit behavior and prune clearing

Ballast (ballast/, tests/):
- Update BallastConfig.overrides from HashMap to BTreeMap in tests
  to match production type change
- Add causing_mount PathBuf field to release test fixtures
- Unwrap manager.verify() Result in integration and stress tests
  to match the new fallible return type

Walker (scanner/walker.rs):
- Suppress dead_code warning on signals_from_children (retained as
  reference implementation alongside the new single-pass approach)

Patterns (tests/stress_tests.rs):
- Use .into() for Cow<str> pattern_name in stress test fixture

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
